name: Boombah Inc.
message: Boombah was founded in 2003 by owner and founder, Rick Tollefson. Boombah Inc. is now one of the fastest growing sporting goods companies in the nation.  Boombah Dominicana located in Santiago, Dominican Republic is a state of the art manufacturing facility opened in 2016.  Our goal is simple to “Be what no one else is and give what no one else will”. We try hard to live up to that vision every single day. We want to provide cutting edge, high quality products at an affordable price, so that our customers can afford the rest of life.
